data.title: Lumen Technologies, Inc. and Qwest Corporation Announce Commencement of Exchange Offers and Consent Solicitations and Intention to Delist Notes
data.description: Lumen Technologies, Inc. announced the commencement of Exchange Offers with Qwest Corporation, its subsidiary, aiming to exchange the 6.5% Notes due 2056 (CUSIP Number 74913G 881) and 6.75% Notes due 2057 (CUSIP Number 74913G 873) (collectively referred to as the "Old Qwest Notes") for 6.500% Notes due 2056. This involves the swap of bonds issued by Qwest for the new 2056 notes. The Exchange Offers involve specific CUSIP Numbers: 74913G 881 for the 2056 Notes and 74913G 873 for the 2057 Notes. The announcement was made under the New York Stock Exchange symbol LUMN.

data.title: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Quarterly Earnings Call Scheduled for Wednesday, April 29th, at 2:00 P.M., Pacific Time
data.description: Las Vegas, April 20, 2026 - GBank Financial Holdings Inc. disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, around 1:15 p.m. PST. The parent company of GBank will conduct its quarterly earnings call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. PST. Attendees can join the call online as there will be no in-person gathering. The Company is listed as Nasdaq: GBFH and invites all interested parties to partake in the event.

data.title: SDR Ventures Named to Axial's 2026 Advisor 100
data.description: A Denver-based mergers and acquisitions advisory and investment banking firm, SDR Ventures, has recently been recognized as one of North America's most trusted lower middle market advisors by peers. This recognition was based on votes from buyers who have worked with them across the table. The achievement was announced on April 20, 2026, marking a significant milestone for the firm. SDR Ventures' reputation for excellence in the industry is reflected in this accolade, showcasing their dedication and expertise in facilitating successful M&A deals.

data.title: KYOCERA AVX Launches new Traction-Grade DC Filtering Capacitors
data.description: The latest FFLK series DC filtering film capacitors provide superior volumetric efficiency, durability, and cost savings across a range of sizes, voltage ratings, and capacitance values. These capacitors excel in demanding traction applications compared to traditional DC film capacitors and aluminum electrolytics.

data.title: Agile Defense to Fast-Track USCIS Digital Modernization with $118M RAPID Award
data.description: Agile Defense, a company specializing in Digital Transformation, Cybersecurity, and Data Analytics solutions, revealed today that they have secured a dual-vendor contract worth $118 million for a duration of five years. This contract, known as the Rapid Application and Product Integration Delivery (RAPID)...

data.title: TransLoop Ranks #71 on 2026 Transport Topics' Top 100 Freight Brokerage List, climbing 15 spots from 2025
data.description: In Chicago on April 20, 2026, it was announced that TransLoop has earned the prestigious recognition as one of Transport Topics' Top 100 Freight Brokerage Firms for the third year running. Achieving a notable advancement, the company climbed 15 spots to secure the 71st position in 2026. Following its debut at #95 in 2024 and subsequent rise to #86 in 2025, TransLoop's latest ranking demonstrates a substantial improvement, marking a successful trend in its performance in recent years.

data.title: Olivia Munn and Gayle King Spotlight Breast Cancer Risk Awareness, As #1 App Helps Women Take Action
data.description: In Salt Lake City on April 20, 2026, Olivia Munn emphasized the importance of understanding one's personal risk in saving her life through early detection of breast cancer. Her message resonated with many women, highlighting the significance of knowing one's risk in shaping their future.

data.title: Tampax spotlights all-star athlete lineup led by Olivia Miles, bringing "Queen's Court" fan experience to women's basketball's biggest moments
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Cincinnati, Olivia Miles, a promising talent, is at the forefront of Tampax's expanding group of top athletes. The brand is emphasizing its dedication to backing women in sports by focusing on confidence, performance, and reliable protection. Explore the complete interactive platform for more information about this initiative and its impact on female athletes.

data.title: OT Security Experts Warn: Your Team Isn't the Problem. Your Architecture Is.
data.description: A recent live webinar held in Irving, Texas on April 20, 2026, highlighted the risks associated with manual rule creation in industrial organizations. The event revealed that manual rule creation is a common vulnerability in OT security programs, leaving many organizations exposed to potential threats. The webinar discussed the importance of adopting auto-learning protection mechanisms to address this issue and improve overall security posture. Industrial organizations are encouraged to reevaluate their security strategies and consider implementing auto-learning protection to enhance their defenses against cyber threats.

data.title: Verdent: The World's First AI Engineering Team for Builders
data.description: In Singapore on April 20, 2026, Verdent revealed a significant update in the construction industry. Research shows that the challenge for many builders is not a lack of ideas but rather the gap between concept and execution. This disconnect often leads to failures within the sector. Verdent's latest announcement aims to address this issue by introducing a revamped system that streamlines the process, increasing efficiency and reducing errors. This update is a game-changer for builders, as it provides a solution to a common obstacle in the industry. The impact of this innovation is expected to be substantial, benefiting numerous construction projects moving forward.

data.title: FANUC America Debuts Ultra‑Lightweight CRX‑3iA Collaborative Robot and New Capabilities Across the CRX Lineup
data.description: FANUC America, a top supplier of CNCs and robotics, has introduced a new highly portable cobot along with enhanced features for the CRX line. These innovations provide manufacturers with additional automation options for various tasks like handling heavy loads, palletizing, welding, and managing high-mix operations. Based in Rochester Hills, Michigan, the company revealed these developments on April 20, 2026. The new cobot and CRX enhancements aim to streamline operations and improve efficiency in manufacturing processes.

data.title: MIAMI REALTORS® and RWorld Announce Merger
data.description: In a significant development in the real estate sector, the MIAMI Association of REALTORS® (MIAMI) and Broward, Palm Beaches & St. Lucie Realtors® (RWorld) have announced their merger to form the world's largest local realtor association and multiple listing service (MLS). This merger will consolidate the two entities into a single association and MLS, with a combined membership of X real estate professionals. The decision aims to streamline operations, enhance services, and create a stronger, more unified presence in the market. The move is set to greatly impact the real estate landscape in the region and is anticipated to lead to numerous benefits for members of both associations.

data.title: HelloNation Article Featuring Home Improvement Expert Matt Edwards Explains How Exterior Painting Boosts Home Value and Curb Appeal
data.description: A recent article discusses the benefits of exterior painting for homeowners, emphasizing its role in enhancing protection, aesthetics, and overall property value. In San Diego, on April 20, 2026, HelloNation highlighted the importance of this home improvement method. By investing in exterior painting, homeowners can easily boost their property's value, safeguard it from daily wear and tear, and improve its overall appearance. This cost-effective solution offers a practical way to enhance homes, increasing their market worth and curb appeal.

data.title: LANCÔME WELCOMES ZOE SALDAÑA AS GLOBAL AMBASSADOR
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in New York, Lancôme announced Zoe Saldaña as the newest addition to its Collective of Global Ambassadors. Known for her modern femininity and confidence, Saldaña, an Academy Award-winning actress, producer, and global icon, has become a part of the brand's prestigious team. This collaboration aims to leverage Saldaña's influence and reach in representing Lancôme's values and products to a wider audience.

data.title: CFE FUND LAUNCHES FIFTH NATIONAL BANK ON FELLOWSHIP WITH SUPPORT FROM THE WELLS FARGO FOUNDATION
data.description: Five individuals have been chosen as full-time Bank On Fellows to spearhead efforts in enhancing banking access in different regions. These Fellows will work with government officials, community groups, and financial institutions to achieve this goal. The Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund (CFE Fund) revealed this development in New York on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Remarkably Resilient Together Encourages Practical Action During May's Mental Health Awareness Month
data.description: In honor of Mental Health Awareness Month this May, a community-based program in Kansas City, Missouri is providing accessible resources to aid individuals in coping with stress, controlling emotions, and strengthening resilience. The program aims to offer simple yet impactful tools to support mental well-being. This initiative aligns with the national campaign to raise awareness about mental health issues, with the goal of minimizing related challenges.

data.title: Harbor Group International Rises to No. 15 on NMHC's 2026 Top Owners List
data.description: In the recent rankings released by the National Multifamily Housing Council (NMHC), Harbor Group International, LLC (HGI) has secured significant positions. HGI is placed at No. 15 on the Top Owners list, demonstrating strong performance in the industry. Additionally, the firm has secured the 29th position on the Top Managers list and the 16th position on the Top Developers list. This marks a remarkable achievement for HGI, showcasing its expertise and influence in the real estate sector. The rankings highlight HGI's increasing prominence and success in the market.
